sentence: 这部电视剧的主题歌很好听。
pinyin: Zhè bù diàn shì jù de zhǔ tí gē hěn hǎo tīng.
english: The theme song of this TV drama is really nice.

meaning: man-made fiber (abbr. for 化學纖維|化学纤维[hua4 xue2 xian1 wei2])
sentence: 这件衬衫是化纤的，不太透气。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn chèn shān shì huà xiān de, bù tài tòu qì.
english: This shirt is made of synthetic fiber and isn't very breathable.

sentence: 湖面上有几只白色的天鹅在游水。
pinyin: Húmiàn shàng yǒu jǐ zhī báisè de tiān'é zài yóushuǐ.
english: A few white swans are swimming on the lake.

sentence: 他听到这个消息只是摇头叹气。
pinyin: Tā tīngdào zhège xiāoxi zhǐshì yáotóu tànqì.
english: Hearing the news, he just shook his head and sighed.

sentence: 通奸在某些国家仍是违法的。
pinyin: Tōngjiān zài mǒuxiē guójiā réng shì wéifǎ de.
english: Adultery is still illegal in some countries.

meaning: 1. fair; 2. market (in a public place); 3. small town
sentence: 周末的市集上有很多新鲜蔬菜。
pinyin: Zhōumò de shìjí shàng yǒu hěnduō xīnxiān shūcài.
english: There are lots of fresh vegetables at the weekend market.

meaning: 1. to emulate; 2. to simulate; 3. emulation; 4. simulation
sentence: 工程师用仿真软件测试新设计。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī yòng fǎngzhēn ruǎnjiàn cèshì xīn shèjì.
english: Engineers use simulation software to test new designs.

sentence: 他爷爷喜欢在家自己酿酒。
pinyin: Tā yéye xǐhuān zài jiā zìjǐ niàngjiǔ.
english: His grandfather likes to brew his own wine at home.

meaning: 1. after drinking; 2. under the influence of alcohol
sentence: 请不要酒后开车，非常危险。
pinyin: Qǐng búyào jiǔhòu kāichē, fēicháng wēixiǎn.
english: Please don't drink and drive — it's very dangerous.

sentence: 他们坚持用非暴力方式表达诉求。
pinyin: Tāmen jiānchí yòng fēibàolì fāngshì biǎodá sùqiú.
english: They insist on expressing their demands through nonviolent means.

meaning: 1. to audit and determine; 2. to check and ratify; 3. to appraise and
sentence: 预算需要经过财务部门核定后才能执行。
pinyin: Yùsuàn xūyào jīngguò cáiwù bùmén hédìng hòu cáinéng zhíxíng.
english: The budget must be reviewed and approved by the finance department before it can be implemented.

sentence: 几个寡头控制了该国大部分能源。
pinyin: Jǐgè guǎtóu kòngzhìle gāiguó dàbùfèn néngyuán.
english: A few oligarchs control most of the country's energy resources.

sentence: 有事找街坊邻居帮帮忙就好了。
pinyin: Yǒu shì zhǎo jiēfāng línjū bāng bāng máng jiù hǎo le.
english: If you need help, just ask the neighbors.

meaning: To go crazy; To go mad, to go crazy
sentence: 他听到这个消息差点儿发疯。
pinyin: Tā tīngdào zhège xiāoxi chàdiǎnr fāfēng.
english: He almost went crazy when he heard the news.

sentence: 两人互换了联系方式。
pinyin: Liǎng rén hùhuànle liánxì fāngshì.
english: The two exchanged contact information with each other.

meaning: To strip naked, to strip nude
sentence: 孩子洗澡前把衣服脱光了。
pinyin: Háizi xǐzǎo qián bǎ yīfu tuōguāng le.
english: The child stripped off all his clothes before taking a bath.

sentence: 村里的老人相信巫术能治病。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de lǎorén xiāngxìn wūshù néng zhìbìng.
english: The village elders believe witchcraft can cure illness.

meaning: Wry face, to grimace, to pull a face
sentence: 小弟弟对着镜子做鬼脸逗大家笑。
pinyin: Xiǎo dìdi duìzhe jìngzi zuò guǐliǎn dòu dàjiā xiào.
english: The little boy made faces in the mirror to make everyone laugh.

sentence: 他被指控犯有叛国罪。
pinyin: Tā bèi zhǐkòng fànyǒu pànguó zuì.
english: He was accused of committing treason.

sentence: 电器安装时要注意接地是否可靠。
pinyin: Diànqì ānzhuāng shí yào zhùyì jiēdì shìfǒu kěkào.
english: When installing appliances, make sure the earthing connection is reliable.

sentence: 他穿着军装出现在毕业典礼上。
pinyin: Tā chuānzhe jūnzhuāng chūxiàn zài bìyè diǎnlǐ shàng.
english: He appeared at the graduation ceremony wearing his military uniform.

sentence: 博物馆门口站着两名卫兵。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn ménkǒu zhànzhe liǎng míng wèibīng.
english: Two guards stand at the entrance of the museum.

meaning: 1. junior ranking officer in Chinese army; 2. major; 3. lieutenant com
sentence: 他刚被晋升为少校。
pinyin: Tā gāng bèi jìnshēng wéi shàoxiào.
english: He was just promoted to the rank of major.

sentence: 超速驾驶可能带来严重后果。
pinyin: Chāosù jiàshǐ kěnéng dàilái yánzhòng hòuguǒ.
english: Speeding can lead to grave consequences.

sentence: 他们声称这是一场圣战。
pinyin: Tāmen chēngchēng zhè shì yī chǎng shèngzhàn.
english: They claimed it was a holy war.

sentence: 机器长期使用会产生一定的损耗。
pinyin: Jīqì chángqī shǐyòng huì chǎnshēng yīdìng de sǔnhào.
english: Long-term use of machinery results in a certain degree of wear and tear.

meaning: 1. across one's whole face; 2. (smiling) from ear to ear
sentence: 她满面笑容地迎接每一位客人。
pinyin: Tā mǎnmiàn xiàoróng de yíngjiē měi yī wèi kèrén.
english: She greeted every guest with a smile across her whole face.

sentence: 他在大学选修了宇宙学这门课。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiūle yǔzhòuxué zhè mén kè.
english: He took a cosmology course as an elective in college.

meaning: 1. to revamp; 2. a face-lift; 3. to retread (a tire); 4. to refurbish
sentence: 他们花了两个月把老房子翻新了。
pinyin: Tāmen huāle liǎng gè yuè bǎ lǎo fángzi fānxīn le.
english: They spent two months renovating the old house.

sentence: 这个品牌主要面向有品位的熟女群体。
pinyin: Zhège pǐnpái zhǔyào miànxiàng yǒu pǐnwèi de shúnǚ qúntǐ.
english: This brand mainly targets stylish and confident middle-aged women.

sentence: 相关手续业已办理完毕。
pinyin: Xiāngguān shǒuxù yèyǐ bànlǐ wánbì.
english: The relevant procedures have already been completed.

sentence: 边境检查站发现了一批走私轻武器。
pinyin: Biānjìng jiǎncházhàn fāxiànle yī pī zǒusī qīngwǔqì.
english: A border checkpoint discovered a batch of smuggled light weapons.

meaning: 1. to learn sth over again; 2. to review; 3. to brush up; 4. to revive
sentence: 周末她喜欢重温小时候看过的老电影。
pinyin: Zhōumò tā xǐhuān chóngwēn xiǎoshíhou kànguò de lǎo diànyǐng.
english: On weekends she likes to revisit old movies she watched as a child.

sentence: 书末附有详细的引得，方便查阅。
pinyin: Shū mò fù yǒu xiángxì de yǐndé, fāngbiàn cháyuè.
english: A detailed index is appended at the end of the book for easy reference.

sentence: 这个词意指一种特别的感情状态。
pinyin: Zhège cí yìzhǐ yī zhǒng tèbié de gǎnqíng zhuàngtài.
english: This word implies a particular emotional state.

sentence: 这部电影获得了观众的广泛赞誉。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng huòdéle guānzhòng de guǎngfàn zànyù.
english: This film received widespread praise from the audience.

meaning: 1. to increase sharply; 2. to rise dramatically
sentence: 最近这里的房价暴涨，很多人买不起了。
pinyin: Zuìjìn zhèlǐ de fángjià bàozhǎng, hěn duō rén mǎi bu qǐ le.
english: Housing prices here have surged recently and many people can no longer afford them.

sentence: 医生还没查清楚他的病因。
pinyin: Yīshēng hái méi chá qīngchǔ tā de bìngyīn.
english: The doctor hasn't yet determined the cause of his illness.

sentence: 诚实是他做人的基本信条。
pinyin: Chéngshí shì tā zuòrén de jīběn xìntiáo.
english: Honesty is his fundamental creed in life.

sentence: 他十五岁就去餐厅当学徒了。
pinyin: Tā shíwǔ suì jiù qù cāntīng dāng xuétú le.
english: He started working as an apprentice at a restaurant at the age of fifteen.

sentence: 我买的是二等座，没有商务座贵。
pinyin: Wǒ mǎi de shì èrděng zuò, méiyǒu shāngwù zuò guì.
english: I bought a second-class seat, which is not as expensive as a business class seat.

sentence: 他出差期间借住在朋友家里。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi qījiān jièzhù zài péngyou jiālǐ.
english: He stayed at a friend's place during his business trip.

sentence: 政府派兵前往灾区协助救援。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ pàibīng qiánwǎng zāiqū xiézhù jiùyuán.
english: The government dispatched troops to the disaster area to assist with rescue efforts.

sentence: 他不愿意为权贵低头。
pinyin: Tā bù yuànyì wèi quánguì dītóu.
english: He is unwilling to bow his head to the powerful and privileged.

meaning: 1. to defend the crown (in sports championship)
sentence: 他们希望在下届比赛中成功卫冕。
pinyin: Tāmen xīwàng zài xià jiè bǐsài zhōng chénggōng wèimiǎn.
english: They hope to successfully defend their title in the next competition.

sentence: 他托父母去女方家提亲。
pinyin: Tā tuō fùmǔ qù nǚfāng jiā tíqīn.
english: He asked his parents to go to the girl's family to propose marriage.

meaning: 1. to divide into rows; 2. to identify subcategories; 3. to break down
sentence: 表格将费用分列成几个类别。
pinyin: Biǎogé jiāng fèiyòng fēnliè chéng jǐ gè lèibié.
english: The table breaks down the expenses into several categories.

meaning: 1. to be attacked by an assassin
sentence: 那位市长昨晚遇刺，目前正在抢救中。
pinyin: Nà wèi shìzhǎng zuówǎn yùcì, mùqián zhèngzài qiǎngjiù zhōng.
english: The mayor was attacked by an assassin last night and is currently receiving emergency treatment.

meaning: 1. hem of a skirt; 2. shirt tail
sentence: 她的裙子下摆绣着一排小花。
pinyin: Tā de qúnzi xiàbǎi xiùzhe yī pái xiǎo huā.
english: The hem of her skirt has a row of small flowers embroidered on it.

sentence: 他把项目的源代码上传到了网上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xiàngmù de yuándàimǎ shàngghuán dào le wǎngshàng.
english: He uploaded the project's source code online.
